hero.title: The best place to live the tournament
hero.subtitle: Exclusive promotions, dining experiences and the perfect atmosphere to enjoy every match at Hoteles Diestra.

intro.title: Diestra Group Gastronomy
intro.body: Follow all the World Cup action from the best culinary spots in our properties. Explore dishes and official promotions:

detalle.disclaimer: Times subject to FIFA confirmation. Hotel suggestion is based on the match venue.

centro.sinPromos: This venue has no active promotions.

contacto.title: Get the best World Cup promos
contacto.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll email you when new promotions launch at Diestra hotels during the tournament.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our promos
newsletter.subtitle: Get the best 2026 World Cup dining promotions delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.consentimiento: I agree to receive communications from Grupo Diestra and understand my data will be handled under the

success.title: Subscription confirmed!
success.body: We'll send the next promotions to your inbox.

errors.faltantes: Please enter your name and email.
errors.consentimiento: We need your consent to send you communications.
errors.envio: We couldn't send your subscription. Please try again in a few minutes.

buscar.placeholder: Search hotel, promo, team or venue…
buscar.empty: Type something to find hotels, promotions, matches or news.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The content you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

responsable.title: Data controller
responsable.body: Grupo Diestra (the "Controller"), reachable at corporativogpodiestra@gmail.com, is responsible for the use and protection of your personal data.

datos.title: Personal data collected
datos.body: Through the newsletter signup form we collect: name, email and, optionally, your preferred city. We do not request sensitive data.

finalidades.title: Purposes of processing
finalidades.body: Your data is used solely to send you information about dining promotions at Grupo Diestra hotels during the 2026 tournament, and occasionally before and after it. We do not perform profiling, scoring, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.

transferencias.title: Transfers
transferencias.body: Your data is not transferred to third parties, except to providers strictly necessary to operate the service (for example, the email delivery service). These providers act as data processors under our instructions.

derechos.title: ARCO rights and consent withdrawal
derechos.body: You may exercise your rights of Access, Rectification, Cancellation or Opposition (ARCO), and withdraw the consent you granted us, at any time by emailing corporativogpodiestra@gmail.com with the subject "ARCO Rights". We'll address your request within the deadlines established by Mexican data protection law (LFPDPPP).

cambios.title: Changes to this notice
cambios.body: Any changes to this notice will be published on this same page. We recommend reviewing it periodically.
